headline: Reflecting On Healthcare Equipment and Supplies Stocks’ Q1 Earnings: GE HealthCare (NASDAQ:GEHC)
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how GE HealthCare (NASDAQ:GEHC) and the rest of the healthcare equipment and supplies stocks fared in Q1.

headline: Butterfly Network: Don't Chase The Midjourney Pop
summary: Butterfly Network jumped about 56% to $8.90 in one session after Midjourney unveiled a full-body ultrasound scanner. Find out why BFLY stock is a hold.
